org.arakhne.neteditor.io.graphml.readers

Class AbstractGraphMLReader

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.AbstractNetEditorReader
      • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.xml.AbstractXMLToolReader
        • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.xml.AbstractXMLReader
          • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.graphml.readers.AbstractGraphMLReader
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    GraphMLConstants, NetEditorReader, XMLConstants
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    GraphMLReader1, GraphMLReader2

    public abstract class AbstractGraphMLReader
extends AbstractXMLReader
implements GraphMLConstants
    This abstract class permits to read a graph-model from the GraphML format.

    GraphML is a comprehensive and easy-to-use file format for graphs. It consists of a language core to describe the structural properties of a graph and a flexible extension mechanism to add application-specific data.

    Since:
    16.0
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:04
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    See Also:
    "http://graphml.graphdrawing.org/"
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-io

      • createGraphMLReader

        public static AbstractGraphMLReader createGraphMLReader(String version)
        Create a GraphML reader that is corresponding to the given NetEditor/GraphML specification version.
        Parameters:

        Returns:
        the reader.

      • extractAttributes

        protected final Map<String,Object> extractAttributes(Element node,
                                   Progression progression)
                                              throws IOException
        Extract the attributes from the specified node.
        Specified by:
        extractAttributes in class AbstractXMLReader
        Parameters:
        node - is the node to explore.
        progression - is the progression indicator to be used to notify about the progression of the extraction.
        Returns:
        the extracted attributes.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • extractProprietaryAttributes

        protected final boolean extractProprietaryAttributes(Element dataN,
                                   Map<String,Object> extractedProperties,
                                   Progression progression)
                                              throws IOException
        Extract any attribute dedicated to the NetEditor API.
        Parameters:
        dataN - is the node of the data to parse.
        extractedProperties - are the extracted properties.
        progression - is the indicator that is used to notify on the progression of the extraction.
        Returns:
        true if a data was extracted, false otherwise.
        Throws:
        IOException
